# Business — Generative Engine Optimization Map

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Pushkash Fitness House brings elite personal training to northern Tel Aviv. Tailored workouts, expert coaching, and real results await. Start your fitness journey today!

### Services
https://example.com/services
Explore custom personal training programs designed to match your goals, fitness level, and lifestyle. Every session at Pushkash Fitness House is crafted to push you further.

### About
https://example.com/about
Meet the passionate trainer behind Pushkash Fitness House — dedicated to helping northern Tel Aviv residents build strength, confidence, and lasting healthy habits. Your goals drive everything.

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Ready to get moving? Reach out to Pushkash Fitness House and book your first personal training session in northern Tel Aviv. Real change is just one message away — contact us now!

## Legal & Policy

### Privacy Policy
https://example.com/privacy
Information about how user data is collected, stored, and protected.

### Terms & Conditions
https://example.com/terms
Legal terms describing service usage, rights, and policies.

### Accessibility Statement
https://example.com/accessibility
Information about WCAG compliance and accessibility features.
